        "contents": "- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\n\n## 📝 输出示例\n\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\n\n```markdown\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\n<!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\n\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\n\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\n\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\n\n---\n\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\n\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\n让我分析一下需求...\n</details></think>\n\n---\n\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\n\n---\n```\n\n## 🐛 故障排除\n\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\n\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\n\n**解决**: \n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\n\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\n\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\n\n**解决**: \n- 确保已安装 Cursor\n- 数据库位置:\n  - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\n  - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n  - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\n\n**可能原因**:\n1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\n3. 工作区未打开\n\n**解决**:\n1. 检查设置: `\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true`\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\n\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\n\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\n\n**解决**: \n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\n\n## 📊 日志查看\n\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\n\n典型日志:\n```\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\n",
        "originalContents": "- **搜索**: \"Save Chat History Now\"\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\n\n## 📝 输出示例\n\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\n\n```markdown\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\n<!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\n\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\n\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\n\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\n\n---\n\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\n\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\n让我分析一下需求...\n</details></think>\n\n---\n\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\n\n---\n```\n\n## 🐛 故障排除\n\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\n\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\n\n**解决**: \n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\n\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\n\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\n\n**解决**: \n- 确保已安装 Cursor\n- 数据库位置:\n  - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\n  - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n  - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\n\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\n\n**可能原因**:\n1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\n3. 工作区未打开\n\n**解决**:\n1. 检查设置: `\"chatHistory.autoSave\": true`\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\n3. 尝试手动执行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\"扩展宿主\"）\n\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\n\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\n\n**解决**: \n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\n\n## 📊 日志查看\n\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\"输出\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\"扩展宿主\"\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\n\n典型日志:\n```\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\n",

        "contents": "# Cursor 聊天记录导出系统 - 完整实施方案\n\n> 基于对 Cursor SQLite 数据库的实际验证和分析\n> 文档版本: 1.0\n> 创建日期: 2025-12-23\n\n---\n\n## 📋 目录\n\n1. [项目概述](#项目概述)\n2. [数据源分析](#数据源分析)\n3. [核心数据结构](#核心数据结构)\n4. [实施步骤](#实施步骤)\n5. [代码实现示例](#代码实现示例)\n6. [Markdown 生成规则](#markdown-生成规则)\n7. [常见问题](#常见问题)\n\n---\n\n## 项目概述\n\n### 目标\n\n实现一个 VS Code/Cursor 扩展，自动捕获并保存用户与 AI 的对话历史为 Markdown 格式。\n\n### 核心功能\n\n- ✅ 自动监听 Cursor 对话数据库变化\n- ✅ 读取用户输入、AI 思考过程和 AI 响应\n- ✅ 转换为结构化的 Markdown 文件\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名，便于版本控制\n- ✅ 支持 Git 友好的格式\n\n---\n\n## 数据源分析\n\n### 1. 数据库位置\n\n**Windows:**\n```\nC:\\Users\\{用户名}\\AppData\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb\n```\n\n**macOS:**\n```\n~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb\n```\n\n**Linux:**\n```\n~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb\n```\n\n### 2. 数据库结构\n\n```sql\n-- 主表\nCREATE TABLE cursorDiskKV (\n    key TEXT UNIQUE ON CONFLICT REPLACE,\n    value BLOB\n);\n\n-- 键值对存储模型\n-- 键格式示例:\n--   composerData:{composerId}\n--   bubbleId:{composerId}:{bubbleId}\n```\n\n### 3. 关键表名\n\n**实际验证结果**：\n- ✅ 主表名：`cursorDiskKV` (不是 ItemTable)\n- ✅ 包含 composerData 和 bubbleId 数据\n\n---\n\n## 核心数据结构\n\n### Composer Data（对话容器）\n\n**键格式**：`composerData:{composerId}`\n\n**数据结构**：\n\n```typescript\n",

[核心数据结构](#核心数据结构)\n4. [实施步骤](#实施步骤)\n5. [代码实现示例](#代码实现示例)\n6. [Markdown 生成规则](#markdown-生成规则)\n7. [常见问题](#常见问题)\n\n---\n\n## 项目概述\n\n### 目标\n\n实现一个 VS Code/Cursor 扩展，自动捕获并保存用户与 AI 的对话历史为 Markdown 格式。\n\n### 核心功能\n\n- ✅ 自动监听 Cursor 对话数据库变化\n- ✅ 读取用户输入、AI 思考过程和 AI 响应\n- ✅ 转换为结构化的 Markdown 文件\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名，便于版本控制\n- ✅ 支持 Git 友好的格式\n\n---\n\n## 数据源分析\n\n### 1. 数据库位置\n\n**Windows:**\n```\nC:\\Users\\{用户名}\\AppData\\Roaming\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb\n```\n\n**macOS:**\n```\n~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb\n```\n\n**Linux:**\n```\n~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb\n```\n\n### 2. 数据库结构\n\n```sql\n-- 主表\nCREATE TABLE cursorDiskKV (\n    key TEXT UNIQUE ON CONFLICT REPLACE,\n    value BLOB\n);\n\n-- 键值对存储模型\n-- 键格式示例:\n--   composerData:{composerId}\n--   bubbleId:{composerId}:{bubbleId}\n```\n\n### 3. 关键表名\n\n**实际验证结果**：\n- ✅ 主表名：`cursorDiskKV` (不是 ItemTable)\n- ✅ 包含 composerData 和 bubbleId 数据\n\n---\n\n## 核心数据结构\n\n### Composer Data（对话容器）\n\n**键格式**：`composerData:{composerId}`\n\n**数据结构**：\n\n```typescript\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "Cursor聊天记录导出实施方案.md",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {

          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 538,
            "column": 8
          }
        },
        "contents": "class HistorySaver {\n    private historyDir: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string) {\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 保存对话到文件\n     */\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\n        // 确保目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\n        \n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n        \n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n        \n        if (shouldSave) {\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n            console.log(`Saved: ${filename}`);\n        }\n        \n        return filepath;\n    }\n    \n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\n        \n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\n    }\n    \n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\n        // 移除特殊字符\n        return title\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\n            .toLowerCase()\n            .substring(0, 50);\n    }\n    \n",
        "originalContents": "class HistorySaver {\n    private historyDir: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string) {\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, '.llm-chat-history');\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 保存对话到文件\n     */\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\n        // 确保目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\n        \n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n        \n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n        \n        if (shouldSave) {\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n            console.log(`Saved: ${filename}`);\n        }\n        \n        return filepath;\n    }\n    \n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\n        \n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\n    }\n    \n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\n        // 移除特殊字符\n        return title\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\n            .toLowerCase()\n            .substring(0, 50);\n    }\n    \n",

        "contents": "export class ClineWatcher {\n\n    \n    ...\n\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                //         "originalContents": "\n    \n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const reader = new ClineReader(this.storageDir);\n\n        if (!reader.exists()) {\n            console.warn('[Cline] Storage directory not found:', this.storageDir);\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            const tasks = reader.getAllTasks();\n\n            if (tasks.length === 0) {\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            let savedCount = 0;\n            for (const task of tasks) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的任务\n                if (!this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(task)) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ClineConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(task);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new ClineMarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(task, messages);\n\n                // 保存\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cline');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: task.id,\n                    name: task.metadata.task,\n                    createdAt: new Date(task.metadata.ts).toISOString()\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Cline] Saved task ${task.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;",

        "contents": "export class KiloWatcher {\n    ...\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n\n\n                ...\n\n\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'kilo');\n\n                const composerLike = {\n                    composerId: conversation.id,\n                    name: conversation.title,\n                    createdAt: conversation.createdAt\n                };\n\n                const savedPath = await saver.save(composerLike as any, markdown);\n                console.log(`[Kilo] Saved conversation ${conversation.id} to: ${savedPath}`);\n                savedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                // 确保 toolResults 和 toolUses 格式正确\n                const normalizedMessages: Message[] = messages.map(msg => ({\n                    ...msg,\n                    toolUses: msg.toolUses?.map((tu: any) => ({\n                        name: tu.name,\n                        markdown: typeof tu.input === 'string' ? tu.input : JSON.stringify(tu.input),\n                    })),\n                    toolResults: msg.toolResults?.map((tr: any) => ({\n                        name: tr.toolUseId || tr.name || 'unknown',\n                        result: tr.content || tr.result,\n                    })),\n                }));\n\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: conversation.title || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: conversation.id,\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\n                    messages: normalizedMessages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "src/extension.ts",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 18,
            "column": 63
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 469,
            "column": 1
          }
        },
        "contents": "\n\n/**\n * 扩展激活时调用\n */\nexport async function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension activated');\n\n    // 初始化遥测管理器\n    const telemetry = TelemetryManager.getInstance(context);\n    await telemetry.initialize();\n\n    // 检查是否首次安装\n    const isFirstInstall = await telemetry.checkFirstInstall();\n    if (isFirstInstall) {\n        telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_INSTALLED);\n    }\n    \n    // 首先确保 better-sqlite3 已正确加载\n    const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(context.extensionPath);\n    const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n    \n    if (!sqliteReady) {\n        console.error('Failed to load better-sqlite3, extension will not function properly');\n        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: Failed to initialize database module. Please check logs.',\n            'View Logs'\n        ).then(selection => {\n            if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n            }\n        });\n        // Continue activation but without database functionality\n    }\n    \n    // 获取配置\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const autoSave = config.get<boolean>('autoSave', true);\n    const localeSetting = config.get<string>('locale', 'auto') as any;\n    const t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    \n    if (!autoSave) {\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;",
        "originalContents": "\n\n/**\n * 扩展激活时调用\n */\nexport async function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension activated');\n\n    // 初始化遥测管理器\n    const telemetry = TelemetryManager.getInstance(context);\n    await telemetry.initialize();\n\n    // 检查是否首次安装\n    const isFirstInstall = await telemetry.checkFirstInstall();\n    if (isFirstInstall) {\n        telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_INSTALLED);\n    }\n    \n    // 首先确保 better-sqlite3 已正确加载\n    const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(context.extensionPath);\n    const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n    \n    if (!sqliteReady) {\n        console.error('Failed to load better-sqlite3, extension will not function properly');\n        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: Failed to initialize database module. Please check logs.',\n            'View Logs'\n        ).then(selection => {\n            if (selection === 'View Logs') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.toggleDevTools');\n            }\n        });\n        // Continue activation but without database functionality\n    }\n    \n    // 获取配置\n    const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n    const autoSave = config.get<boolean>('autoSave', true);\n    const localeSetting = config.get<string>('locale', 'auto') as any;\n    const t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n    \n    if (!autoSave) {\n        console.log('Auto-save disabled');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 检查是否有打开的工作区\n    if (!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": " './sidebar/status-view';",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {

          },

        "relativeWorkspacePath": "Cursor聊天记录导出实施方案.md",

        "contents": "{\n  \"name\": \"cursor-chat-history\",\n  \"displayName\": \"Cursor Chat History\",\n  \"description\": \"Save Cursor AI chat history to markdown files\",\n  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n  \"engines\": {\n    \"vscode\": \"^1.93.0\"\n  },\n  \"main\": \"./dist/extension.js\",\n  \"activationEvents\": [\n    \"onStartupFinished\"\n  ],\n  \"contributes\": {\n    \"configuration\": {\n      \"title\": \"Chat History\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"chatHistory.autoSave\": {\n          \"type\": \"boolean\",\n          \"default\": true,\n          \"description\": \"Automatically save chat history\"\n        },\n        \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": {\n          \"type\": \"string\",\n          \"default\": \".llm-chat-history\",\n          \"description\": \"Directory to save chat history files\"\n        },\n        \"chatHistory.useUTC\": {\n          \"type\": \"boolean\",\n          \"default\": true,\n          \"description\": \"Use UTC timezone for timestamps\"\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    \"commands\": [\n      {\n        \"command\": \"chatHistory.saveNow\",\n        \"title\": \"Save Chat History Now\"\n      }\n    ]\n  },\n  \"dependencies\": {\n    \"better-sqlite3\": \"^11.0.0\",\n    \"chokidar\": \"^3.6.0\"\n  },\n  \"devDependencies\": {\n    \"@types/vscode\": \"^1.93.0\",\n    \"@types/node\": \"^20.0.0\",\n    \"typescript\": \"^5.0.0\"\n  }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 项目匹配机制\n\n### 核心问题\n\n**如何区分当前项目的聊天记录，避免导出所有 Cursor 对话？**\n\n### 解决方案\n\n每个 Bubble 都包含工作区信息！通过路径匹配来过滤。\n\n#### 关键字段（已验证）\n\n```typescript\n// 每个 Bubble 都包含：\ninterface Bubble {\n    workspaceUris?: string[];          // ← URI 格式的工作区路径\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;      // ← 文件系统绝对路径\n}\n\n// 实际数据示例：\n{\n    \"workspaceUris\": [\"file:///d%3A/Projects/chat_history\"],\n    \"workspaceProjectDir\": \"c:\\\\Users\\\\85786\\\\.cursor\\\\projects\\\\d-Projects-chat-history\"\n}\n```\n\n#### 实现代码\n\n```typescript\n",
        "originalContents": "{\n  \"name\": \"cursor-chat-history\",\n  \"displayName\": \"Cursor Chat History\",\n  \"description\": \"Save Cursor AI chat history to markdown files\",\n  \"version\": \"0.1.0\",\n  \"engines\": {\n    \"vscode\": \"^1.93.0\"\n  },\n  \"main\": \"./dist/extension.js\",\n  \"activationEvents\": [\n    \"onStartupFinished\"\n  ],\n  \"contributes\": {\n    \"configuration\": {\n      \"title\": \"Chat History\",\n      \"properties\": {\n        \"chatHistory.autoSave\": {\n          \"type\": \"boolean\",\n          \"default\": true,\n          \"description\": \"Automatically save chat history\"\n        },\n        \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": {\n          \"type\": \"string\",\n          \"default\": \".llm-chat-history\",\n          \"description\": \"Directory to save chat history files\"\n        },\n        \"chatHistory.useUTC\": {\n          \"type\": \"boolean\",\n          \"default\": true,\n          \"description\": \"Use UTC timezone for timestamps\"\n        }\n      }\n    },\n    \"commands\": [\n      {\n        \"command\": \"chatHistory.saveNow\",\n        \"title\": \"Save Chat History Now\"\n      }\n    ]\n  },\n  \"dependencies\": {\n    \"better-sqlite3\": \"^11.0.0\",\n    \"chokidar\": \"^3.6.0\"\n  },\n  \"devDependencies\": {\n    \"@types/vscode\": \"^1.93.0\",\n    \"@types/node\": \"^20.0.0\",\n    \"typescript\": \"^5.0.0\"\n  }\n}\n```\n\n---\n\n## 项目匹配机制\n\n### 核心问题\n\n**如何区分当前项目的聊天记录，避免导出所有 Cursor 对话？**\n\n### 解决方案\n\n每个 Bubble 都包含工作区信息！通过路径匹配来过滤。\n\n#### 关键字段（已验证）\n\n```typescript\n// 每个 Bubble 都包含：\ninterface Bubble {\n    workspaceUris?: string[];          // ← URI 格式的工作区路径\n    workspaceProjectDir?: string;      // ← 文件系统绝对路径\n}\n\n// 实际数据示例：\n{\n    \"workspaceUris\": [\"file:///d%3A/Projects/chat_history\"],\n    \"workspaceProjectDir\": \"c:\\\\Users\\\\85786\\\\.cursor\\\\projects\\\\d-Projects-chat-history\"\n}\n```\n\n#### 实现代码\n\n```typescript\n",

      "codeBlock": {

        "range": {

        },
        "contents": "# 安装和使用指南\n\n## ✅ 安装完成！\n\n项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\n\n## 📖 使用方法\n\n### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\n\n1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\n   \n2. **按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式**\n   - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\n   - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\n\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\n\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\n\n5. **查看保存的历史**\n- 历史文件保存在: `.llm-chat-history/` 文件夹\n   - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\n\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\n\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\n\n1. **安装打包工具**\n   ```bash\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\n   ```\n\n2. **打包扩展**\n   ```bash\n   vsce package\n   ```\n   这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\n\n3. **安装 VSIX**\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\n   - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\n\n## 🎯 功能特性\n\n### 自动保存\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\n\n### Markdown 格式\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\n\n### 文件管理\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\n\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\n\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\n\n```json\n{\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\n  \n  // 使用 UTC 时区\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\n}\n```\n\n## 🔧 命令\n\n### Save Chat History Now\n- **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\n",
        "originalContents": "# 安装和使用指南\n\n## ✅ 安装完成！\n\n项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\n\n## 📖 使用方法\n\n### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\n\n1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\n   \n2. **按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式**\n   - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\n   - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\n\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\n\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\n\n5. **查看保存的历史**\n- 历史文件保存在: `.llm-chat-history/` 文件夹\n   - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\n\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\n\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\n\n1. **安装打包工具**\n   ```bash\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\n   ```\n\n2. **打包扩展**\n   ```bash\n   vsce package\n   ```\n   这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\n\n3. **安装 VSIX**\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \"从 VSIX 安装...\"\n   - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\n\n## 🎯 功能特性\n\n### 自动保存\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\n\n### Markdown 格式\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\n\n### 文件管理\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\n\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\n\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"chatHistory\":\n\n```json\n{\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\n  \n  // 使用 UTC 时区\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\n}\n```\n\n## 🔧 命令\n\n### Save Chat History Now\n- **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\n",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {

        "range": {

        },
        "contents": "The generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## ⚙️ Configuration (Optional)\n\n**Good news: This extension works out-of-the-box with zero configuration!** 🎉\n\nBut if you want to customize it, here are the available settings:\n\n### Quick Settings Access\n1. Open VS Code Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`)\n2. Type \"Preferences: Open Settings (UI)\"\n3. Search for \"chatHistory\"\n\n### Available Settings\n\n| Setting | Default | Description |\n|---------|---------|-------------|\n| `chatHistory.autoSave` | `true` | ✅ Enable automatic saving of chat history |\n| `chatHistory.outputDirectory` | `.llm-chat-history/history` | 📁 Where to save your chat files |\n| `chatHistory.useUTC` | `true` | 🕐 Use UTC timezone for consistent timestamps |\n| `chatHistory.locale` | `auto` | 🌍 Language: `auto`, `en`, or `zh` |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled` | `false` | ☁️ Enable cloud sync |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.autoSync` | `true` | 🔄 Auto sync to cloud when logged in |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode` | `false` | 🐛 Debug mode (for development only) |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl` | `http://192.168.56.101:9999` | 🔧 Custom server URL (debug mode only) |\n\n### 💡 Pro Tips\n\n- **Keep defaults** for most users - everything works perfectly!\n- **Change output directory** if you prefer a different location\n- **Use UTC** if you work with international teams\n- **Auto locale** adapts to your VS Code language setting\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as beautifully formatted Markdown files:\n\n```markdown\n# Conversation Title\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**Messages**: 4 (User: 2, Assistant: 2)\n**Session ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\n",
        "originalContents": "The generated Markdown files are optimized for direct viewing:\n\n- **VS Code**: Open `.md` files directly with full Markdown preview support\n- **GitHub**: View with rich formatting and collapsible sections\n- **Obsidian/Notion**: Import for knowledge management\n- **Any Markdown Editor**: Standard Markdown with enhanced readability\n\n## ⚙️ Configuration (Optional)\n\n**Good news: This extension works out-of-the-box with zero configuration!** 🎉\n\nBut if you want to customize it, here are the available settings:\n\n### Quick Settings Access\n1. Open VS Code Command Palette (`Ctrl+Shift+P`)\n2. Type \"Preferences: Open Settings (UI)\"\n3. Search for \"chatHistory\"\n\n### Available Settings\n\n| Setting | Default | Description |\n|---------|---------|-------------|\n| `chatHistory.autoSave` | `true` | ✅ Enable automatic saving of chat history |\n| `chatHistory.outputDirectory` | `.llm-chat-history/history` | 📁 Where to save your chat files |\n| `chatHistory.useUTC` | `true` | 🕐 Use UTC timezone for consistent timestamps |\n| `chatHistory.locale` | `auto` | 🌍 Language: `auto`, `en`, or `zh` |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled` | `false` | ☁️ Enable cloud sync |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.autoSync` | `true` | 🔄 Auto sync to cloud when logged in |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugMode` | `false` | 🐛 Debug mode (for development only) |\n| `chatHistory.cloudSync.debugServerUrl` | `http://192.168.56.101:9999` | 🔧 Custom server URL (debug mode only) |\n\n### 💡 Pro Tips\n\n- **Keep defaults** for most users - everything works perfectly!\n- **Change output directory** if you prefer a different location\n- **Use UTC** if you work with international teams\n- **Auto locale** adapts to your VS Code language setting\n\n## Output Format\n\nConversations are saved as beautifully formatted Markdown files:\n\n```markdown\n# Conversation Title\n\n**Created**: 2025-12-23 10:30Z\n**Messages**: 4 (User: 2, Assistant: 2)\n**Session ID**: `abc-123`\n\n---\n\n## 💬 User #1\n\n_2025-12-23 10:30Z_\n\n",

        "contents": "}\n```\n\n**Result**\n\n<details>\n<summary><em>展开查看结果 / View Result</em></summary>\n\n```json\n{\n  \"diff\": {\n    \"chunks\": [\n      {\n        \"diffString\": \"- \\n+ # 安装和使用指南\\n+ \\n+ ## ✅ 安装完成！\\n+ \\n+ 项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\\n+ \\n+ ## 📖 使用方法\\n+ \\n+ ### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\\n+ \\n+ 1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\\n+    \\n+ 2. **按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式**\\n+    - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\\n+    - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\\n+ \\n+ 3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\\n+    - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\\n+    - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\\n+ \\n+ 4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\\n+    - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\\n+    - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\\n+ \\n+ 5. **查看保存的历史**\\n+    - 历史文件保存在: `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\\n+    - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\\n+ \\n+ ### 方法 2: 打包安装\\n+ \\n+ 如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\\n+ \\n+ 1. **安装打包工具**\\n+    ```bash\\n+    npm install -g @vscode/vsce\\n+    ```\\n+ \\n+ 2. **打包扩展**\\n+    ```bash\\n+    vsce package\\n+    ```\\n+    这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\\n+ \\n+ 3. **安装 VSIX**\\n+    - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \\\"从 VSIX 安装...\\\"\\n+    - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\\n+ \\n+ ## 🎯 功能特性\\n+ \\n+ ### 自动保存\\n+ - ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\\n+ - ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\\n+ - ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\\n+ \\n+ ### Markdown 格式\\n+ - ✅ 清晰的对话结构\\n+ - ✅ 时间戳标记\\n+ - ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\\n+ - ✅ 工具调用结果展示\\n+ \\n+ ### 文件管理\\n+ - ✅ 按时间戳命名\\n+ - ✅ Git 友好格式\\n+ - ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\\n+ \\n+ ## ⚙️ 配置选项\\n+ \\n+ 在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \\\"chatHistory\\\":\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   // 启用/禁用自动保存\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true,\\n+   \\n+   // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\".cursor-history\\\",\\n+   \\n+   // 使用 UTC 时区\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.useUTC\\\": true\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 🔧 命令\\n+ \\n+ ### Save Chat History Now\\n+ - **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\\n+ - **搜索**: \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\"\\n+ - **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\\n+ \\n+ ## 📝 输出示例\\n+ \\n+ 保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\\n+ \\n+ ```markdown\\n+ <!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\\n+ <!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\\n+ \\n+ # 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\\n+ \\n+ _**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\\n+ \\n+ 帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ _**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\\n+ \\n+ <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\\n+ 让我分析一下需求...\\n+ </details></think>\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ 我来帮你实现这个插件...\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 🐛 故障排除\\n+ \\n+ ### 问题: 扩展未激活\\n+ \\n+ **原因**: 没有打开工作区\\n+ \\n+ **解决**: \\n+ - 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\\n+ - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\\n+ \\n+ ### 问题: 找不到数据库\\n+ \\n+ **原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\\n+ \\n+ **解决**: \\n+ - 确保已安装 Cursor\\n+ - 数据库位置:\\n+   - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\\n+   - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n+   - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n+ \\n+ ### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\\n+ \\n+ **可能原因**:\\n+ 1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\\n+ 2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\\n+ 3. 工作区未打开\\n+ \\n+ **解决**:\\n+ 1. 检查设置: `\\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true`\\n+ 2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\\n+ 3. 尝试手动执行 \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\" 命令\\n+ 4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\\\"扩展宿主\\\"）\\n+ \\n+ ### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\\n+ \\n+ **原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\\n+ \\n+ **解决**: \\n+ - 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\\n+ - 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\\n+ - 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\\n+ \\n+ ## 📊 日志查看\\n+ \\n+ 1. 在开发窗口中，打开\\\"输出\\\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\\n+ 2. 从下拉菜单选择\\\"扩展宿主\\\"\\n+ 3. 查看扩展的日志输出\\n+ \\n+ 典型日志:\\n+ ```\\n+ Cursor Chat History Extension activated\\n+ Database watcher started\\n+ Found 5 composers\\n+ Saved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 🔄 更新代码后\\n+ \\n+ 如果修改了扩展代码：\\n+ \\n+ 1. **重新编译**:\\n+    ```bash\\n+    npm run compile\\n+    ```\\n+ \\n+ 2. **重新加载扩展**:\\n+    - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\\n+    - 或运行命令 \\\"重新加载窗口\\\"\\n+ \\n+ ## 🌟 高级用法\\n+ \\n+ ### 自定义输出目录\\n+ \\n+ 可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\"docs/ai-conversations\\\"\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ### 禁用自动保存\\n+ \\n+ 如果只想手动保存：\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": false\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ 然后通过命令手动触发保存。\\n+ \\n+ ### Git 集成\\n+ \\n+ 建议将历史文件加入 Git:\\n+ \\n+ ```bash\\n+ # .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\\n+ # 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\\n+ \\n+ git add .cursor-history/\\n+ git commit -m \\\"Add AI conversation history\\\"\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 📚 技术细节\\n+ \\n+ ### 数据库读取\\n+ - 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\\n+ - WAL 模式确保并发访问\\n+ - 自动重试机制\\n+ \\n+ ### 文件监听\\n+ - 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\\n+ - 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\\n+ - 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\\n+ \\n+ ### 文件命名\\n+ - UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\\n+ - 标题自动清理特殊字符\\n+ - 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\\n+ \\n+ ## 🎉 开始使用\\n+ \\n+ 现在你可以：\\n+ \\n+ 1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\\n+ 2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\\n+ 3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\\n+ 4. **查看 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹**\\n+ \\n+ 祝使用愉快！ 🚀\\n+ \",\n",
        "originalContents": "}\n```\n\n**Result**\n\n<details>\n<summary><em>展开查看结果 / View Result</em></summary>\n\n```json\n{\n  \"diff\": {\n    \"chunks\": [\n      {\n        \"diffString\": \"- \\n+ # 安装和使用指南\\n+ \\n+ ## ✅ 安装完成！\\n+ \\n+ 项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\\n+ \\n+ ## 📖 使用方法\\n+ \\n+ ### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\\n+ \\n+ 1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\\n+    \\n+ 2. **按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式**\\n+    - Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\\n+ 3. 工作区未打开\\n+ \\n+ **解决**:\\n+ 1. 检查设置: `\\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true`\\n+ 2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\\n+ 3. 尝试手动执行 \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\" 命令\\n+ 4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\\\"扩展宿主\\\"）\\n+ \\n+ ### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\\n+ \\n+ **原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\\n+ \\n+ **解决**: \\n+ - 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\\n+ - 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\\n+ - 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\\n+ \\n+ ## 📊 日志查看\\n+ \\n+ 1. 在开发窗口中，打开\\\"输出\\\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\\n+ 2. 从下拉菜单选择\\\"扩展宿主\\\"\\n+ 3. 查看扩展的日志输出\\n+ \\n+ 典型日志:\\n+ ```\\n+ Cursor Chat History Extension activated\\n+ Database watcher started\\n+ Found 5 composers\\n+ Saved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 🔄 更新代码后\\n+ \\n+ 如果修改了扩展代码：\\n+ \\n+ 1. **重新编译**:\\n+    ```bash\\n+    npm run compile\\n+    ```\\n+ \\n+ 2. **重新加载扩展**:\\n+    - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\\n+    - 或运行命令 \\\"重新加载窗口\\\"\\n+ \\n+ ## 🌟 高级用法\\n+ \\n+ ### 自定义输出目录\\n+ \\n+ 可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\"docs/ai-conversations\\\"\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ### 禁用自动保存\\n+ \\n+ 如果只想手动保存：\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": false\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ 然后通过命令手动触发保存。\\n+ \\n+ ### Git 集成\\n+ \\n+ 建议将历史文件加入 Git:\\n+ \\n+ ```bash\\n+ # .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\\n+ # 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\\n+ \\n+ git add .cursor-history/\\n+ git commit -m \\\"Add AI conversation history\\\"\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 📚 技术细节\\n+ \\n+ ### 数据库读取\\n+ - 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\\n+ - WAL 模式确保并发访问\\n+ - 自动重试机制\\n+ \\n+ ### 文件监听\\n+ - 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\\n+ - 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\\n+ - 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\\n+ \\n+ ### 文件命名\\n+ - UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\\n+ - 标题自动清理特殊字符\\n+ - 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\\n+ \\n+ ## 🎉 开始使用\\n+ \\n+ 现在你可以：\\n+ \\n+ 1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\\n+ 2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\\n+ 3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\\n+ 4. **查看 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹**\\n+ \\n+ 祝使用愉快！ 🚀\\n+ \",\n",

            "text": "  \"contents\": \"# 安装和使用指南\\n\\n## ✅ 安装完成！\\n\\n项目已成功编译，所有依赖已安装。\\n\\n## 📖 使用方法\\n\\n### 方法 1: 开发模式（推荐用于测试）\\n\\n1. **在 VS Code/Cursor 中打开此项目**\\n   \\n2. **按 `F5` 启动扩展开发模式**\\n   - 这会打开一个新的 VS Code 窗口\\n   - 扩展会自动在这个窗口中激活\\n\\n3. **在新窗口中打开一个工作区**\\n   - 必须打开一个文件夹作为工作区\\n   - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\\n\\n4. **使用 Cursor 进行对话**\\n   - 在 Cursor 的 Composer/Chat 中与 AI 对话\\n   - 扩展会自动监听并保存对话\\n\\n5. **查看保存的历史**\\n   - 历史文件保存在: `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\\n   - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\\n\\n### 方法 2: 打包安装\\n\\n如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\\n\\n1. **安装打包工具**\\n   ```bash\\n   npm install -g @vscode/vsce\\n   ```\\n\\n2. **打包扩展**\\n   ```bash\\n   vsce package\\n   ```\\n   这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\\n\\n3. **安装 VSIX**\\n   - 在 VS Code 中: 扩展视图 → 点击 `...` → \\\"从 VSIX 安装...\\\"\\n   - 选择生成的 `.vsix` 文件\\n\\n## 🎯 功能特性\\n\\n### 自动保存\\n- ✅ 实时监听 Cursor 数据库变化\\n- ✅ 自动捕获所有对话\\n- ✅ 包含用户消息、AI 响应和思考过程\\n\\n### Markdown 格式\\n- ✅ 清晰的对话结构\\n- ✅ 时间戳标记\\n- ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\\n- ✅ 工具调用结果展示\\n\\n### 文件管理\\n- ✅ 按时间戳命名\\n- ✅ Git 友好格式\\n- ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\\n\\n## ⚙️ 配置选项\\n\\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \\\"chatHistory\\\":\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  // 启用/禁用自动保存\\n  \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true,\\n  \\n  // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\\n  \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\".cursor-history\\\",\\n  \\n  // 使用 UTC 时区\\n  \\\"chatHistory.useUTC\\\": true\\n}\\n```\\n\\n## 🔧 命令\\n\\n### Save Chat History Now\\n- **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\\n- **搜索**: \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\"\\n- **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\\n\\n## 📝 输出示例\\n\\n保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\\n\\n```markdown\\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\\n<!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\\n\\n# 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\\n\\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\\n\\n帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\\n\\n---\\n\\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\\n\\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\\n让我分析一下需求...\\n</details></think>\\n\\n---\\n\\n我来帮你实现这个插件...\\n\\n---\\n```\\n\\n## 🐛 故障排除\\n\\n### 问题: 扩展未激活\\n\\n**原因**: 没有打开工作区\\n\\n**解决**: \\n- 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\\n- 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\\n\\n### 问题: 找不到数据库\\n\\n**原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\\n\\n**解决**: \\n- 确保已安装 Cursor\\n- 数据库位置:\\n  - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\\n  - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n  - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n\\n### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\\n\\n**可能原因**:\\n1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\\n2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\\n3. 工作区未打开\\n\\n**解决**:\\n1. 检查设置: `\\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true`\\n2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\\n3. 尝试手动执行 \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\" 命令\\n4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\\\"扩展宿主\\\"）\\n\\n### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\\n\\n**原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\\n\\n**解决**: \\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\\n- 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\\n- 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\\n\\n## 📊 日志查看\\n\\n1. 在开发窗口中，打开\\\"输出\\\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\\n2. 从下拉菜单选择\\\"扩展宿主\\\"\\n3. 查看扩展的日志输出\\n\\n典型日志:\\n```\\nCursor Chat History Extension activated\\nDatabase watcher started\\nFound 5 composers\\nSaved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\\n```\\n\\n## 🔄 更新代码后\\n\\n如果修改了扩展代码：\\n\\n1. **重新编译**:\\n   ```bash\\n   npm run compile\\n   ```\\n\\n2. **重新加载扩展**:\\n   - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\\n   - 或运行命令 \\\"重新加载窗口\\\"\\n\\n## 🌟 高级用法\\n\\n### 自定义输出目录\\n\\n可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\"docs/ai-conversations\\\"\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### 禁用自动保存\\n\\n如果只想手动保存：\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": false\\n}\\n```\\n\\n然后通过命令手动触发保存。\\n\\n### Git 集成\\n\\n建议将历史文件加入 Git:\\n\\n```bash\\n# .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\\n# 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\\n\\ngit add .cursor-history/\\ngit commit -m \\\"Add AI conversation history\\\"\\n```\\n\\n## 📚 技术细节\\n\\n### 数据库读取\\n- 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\\n- WAL 模式确保并发访问\\n- 自动重试机制\\n\\n### 文件监听\\n- 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\\n- 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\\n- 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\\n\\n### 文件命名\\n- UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\\n- 标题自动清理特殊字符\\n- 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\\n\\n## 🎉 开始使用\\n\\n现在你可以：\\n\\n1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\\n2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\\n3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\\n4. **查看 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹**\\n\\n祝使用愉快！ 🚀\\n\"",

扩展会自动监听并保存对话\\n+ \\n+ 5. **查看保存的历史**\\n+    - 历史文件保存在: `.cursor-history/` 文件夹\\n+    - 文件命名格式: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md`\\n+ \\n+ ### 方法 2: 打包安装\\n+ \\n+ 如果要在正常使用中安装扩展：\\n+ \\n+ 1. **安装打包工具**\\n+    ```bash\\n+    npm install -g @vscode/vsce\\n+    ```\\n+ \\n+ 2. **打包扩展**\\n+    ```bash\\n+    vsce package\\n+    ```\\n+    这会生成 `cursor-chat-history-0.1.0.vsix` 文件\\n+ \\n+ 3. **安装 VSIX**\\n+    - ✅ 清晰的对话结构\\n+ - ✅ 时间戳标记\\n+ - ✅ 思考过程折叠显示\\n+ - ✅ 工具调用结果展示\\n+ \\n+ ### 文件管理\\n+ - ✅ 按时间戳命名\\n+ - ✅ Git 友好格式\\n+ - ✅ 自动去重（内容相同不重复保存）\\n+ \\n+ ## ⚙️ 配置选项\\n+ \\n+ 在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \\\"chatHistory\\\":\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   // 启用/禁用自动保存\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true,\\n+   \\n+   // 输出目录（相对于工作区根目录）\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\".cursor-history\\\",\\n+   \\n+   // 使用 UTC 时区\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.useUTC\\\": true\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 🔧 命令\\n+ \\n+ ### Save Chat History Now\\n+ - **打开方式**: `Ctrl+Shift+P` / `Cmd+Shift+P`\\n+ - **搜索**: \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\"\\n+ - **功能**: 立即触发一次历史保存\\n+ \\n+ ## 📝 输出示例\\n+ \\n+ 保存的 Markdown 文件格式：\\n+ \\n+ ```markdown\\n+ <!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\\n+ <!-- Cursor Session abc123 (2025-12-23 10:30Z) -->\\n+ \\n+ # 实现聊天记录导出插件 (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\\n+ \\n+ _**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\\n+ \\n+ 帮我实现一个 Cursor 聊天记录导出插件\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ _**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\\n+ \\n+ <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\\n+ 让我分析一下需求...\\n+ </details></think>\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ 我来帮你实现这个插件...\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 🐛 故障排除\\n+ \\n+ ### 问题: 扩展未激活\\n+ \\n+ **原因**: 没有打开工作区\\n+ \\n+ **解决**: \\n+ - 在 Cursor 中打开一个文件夹（不只是单个文件）\\n+ - 扩展需要工作区来保存历史文件\\n+ \\n+ ### 问题: 找不到数据库\\n+ \\n+ **原因**: Cursor 未安装或数据库路径不正确\\n+ \\n+ **解决**: \\n+ - 确保已安装 Cursor\\n+ - 数据库位置:\\n+   - Windows: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\\n+   - macOS: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n+   - Linux: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n+ \\n+ ### 问题: 没有生成历史文件\\n+ \\n+ **可能原因**:\\n+ 1. `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `false`\\n+ 2. Cursor 数据库中没有对话记录\\n+ 3. 工作区未打开\\n+ \\n+ **解决**:\\n+ 1. 检查设置: `\\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true`\\n+ 2. 在 Cursor 中创建一些对话\\n+ 3. 尝试手动执行 \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\" 命令\\n+ 4. 查看输出面板的日志（选择\\\"扩展宿主\\\"）\\n+ \\n+ ### 问题: 数据库锁定错误\\n+ \\n+ **原因**: 数据库被其他进程占用\\n+ \\n+ **解决**: \\n+ - 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\\n+ - 如果仍有问题，尝试重启 Cursor\\n+ - 检查是否有其他进程在访问数据库\\n+ \\n+ ## 📊 日志查看\\n+ \\n+ 1. 在开发窗口中，打开\\\"输出\\\"面板（`Ctrl+Shift+U`）\\n+ 2. 从下拉菜单选择\\\"扩展宿主\\\"\\n+ 3. 查看扩展的日志输出\\n+ \\n+ 典型日志:\\n+ ```\\n+ Cursor Chat History Extension activated\\n+ Database watcher started\\n+ Found 5 composers\\n+ Saved: 2025-12-23_10-30Z-conversation-title.md\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 🔄 更新代码后\\n+ \\n+ 如果修改了扩展代码：\\n+ \\n+ 1. **重新编译**:\\n+    ```bash\\n+    npm run compile\\n+    ```\\n+ \\n+ 2. **重新加载扩展**:\\n+    - 在开发窗口中按 `Ctrl+R` / `Cmd+R`\\n+    - 或运行命令 \\\"重新加载窗口\\\"\\n+ \\n+ ## 🌟 高级用法\\n+ \\n+ ### 自定义输出目录\\n+ \\n+ 可以为不同项目设置不同的输出目录：\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\"docs/ai-conversations\\\"\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ### 禁用自动保存\\n+ \\n+ 如果只想手动保存：\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": false\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ 然后通过命令手动触发保存。\\n+ \\n+ ### Git 集成\\n+ \\n+ 建议将历史文件加入 Git:\\n+ \\n+ ```bash\\n+ # .gitignore 中不要忽略 .cursor-history\\n+ # 这样可以跟踪 AI 对话历史\\n+ \\n+ git add .cursor-history/\\n+ git commit -m \\\"Add AI conversation history\\\"\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ## 📚 技术细节\\n+ \\n+ ### 数据库读取\\n+ - 使用 `better-sqlite3` 只读模式\\n+ - WAL 模式确保并发访问\\n+ - 自动重试机制\\n+ \\n+ ### 文件监听\\n+ - 使用 `chokidar` 监听数据库变化\\n+ - 2 秒防抖避免频繁写入\\n+ - 2 分钟定时同步作为兜底\\n+ \\n+ ### 文件命名\\n+ - UTC 时间戳确保唯一性\\n+ - 标题自动清理特殊字符\\n+ - 限制文件名长度（最多 50 字符）\\n+ \\n+ ## 🎉 开始使用\\n+ \\n+ 现在你可以：\\n+ \\n+ 1. **按 F5 启动开发模式**\\n+ 2. **在新窗口中打开工作区**\\n+ 3. **开始与 Cursor AI 对话**\\n+ 4. **查看 `.cursor-history/` 文件夹**\\n+ \\n+ 祝使用愉快！ 🚀\\n+ \",",

Clone this repository\\n+ 2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies\\n+ 3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension\\n+ 4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\\n+ \\n+ ### From VSIX\\n+ \\n+ 1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\\n+ 2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\\n+ 3. Click the `...` menu and select \\\"Install from VSIX...\\\"\\n+ 4. Select the downloaded file\\n+ \\n+ ## Usage\\n+ \\n+ The extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\\n+ \\n+ ### Automatic Saving\\n+ \\n+ By default, the extension automatically monitors your Cursor chat history and saves it to `.cursor-history/` in your workspace root.\\n+ \\n+ ### Manual Save\\n+ \\n+ You can manually trigger a save by:\\n+ 1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\\n+ 2. Running the command: \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\"\\n+ \\n+ ## Configuration\\n+ \\n+ Configure the extension in your VS Code settings:\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true,\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\".cursor-history\\\",\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.useUTC\\\": true\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ### Settings\\n+ \\n+ - `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\\n+ - `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.cursor-history`): Directory to save history files\\n+ - `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\\n+ \\n+ ## Output Format\\n+ \\n+ Conversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\\n+ \\n+ ```markdown\\n+ <!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\\n+ <!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\\n+ \\n+ # Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\\n+ \\n+ _**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\\n+ \\n+ User's question here\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ _**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\\n+ \\n+ <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\\n+ AI's thinking process (if available)\\n+ </details></think>\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ AI's response here\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ### File Naming\\n+ \\n+ Files are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\\n+ \\n+ Example: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\\n+ \\n+ ## Requirements\\n+ \\n+ - VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\\n+ - Active Cursor installation with chat history\\n+ \\n+ ## Database Location\\n+ \\n+ The extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\\n+ \\n+ - **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\\n+ - **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n+ - **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n+ \\n+ ## Known Issues\\n+ \\n+ - The extension requires a workspace to be open\\n+ - Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\\n+ \\n+ ## Contributing\\n+ \\n+ Contributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit a Pull Request.\\n+ \\n+ ## License\\n+ \\n+ MIT License - see LICENSE file for details\\n+ \\n+ ## Support\\n+ \\n+ If you encounter any issues, please file them in the GitHub repository.\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ **Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\\n+ \",\n",

Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\\n+ 2. Running the command: \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\"\\n+ \\n+ ## Configuration\\n+ \\n+ Configure the extension in your VS Code settings:\\n+ \\n+ ```json\\n+ {\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true,\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\".cursor-history\\\",\\n+   \\\"chatHistory.useUTC\\\": true\\n+ }\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ### Settings\\n+ \\n+ - `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\\n+ - `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.cursor-history`): Directory to save history files\\n+ - `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\\n+ \\n+ ## Output Format\\n+ \\n+ Conversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\\n+ \\n+ ```markdown\\n+ <!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\\n+ <!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\\n+ \\n+ # Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\\n+ \\n+ _**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\\n+ \\n+ User's question here\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ _**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\\n+ \\n+ <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\\n+ AI's thinking process (if available)\\n+ </details></think>\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ AI's response here\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ ```\\n+ \\n+ ### File Naming\\n+ \\n+ Files are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\\n+ \\n+ Example: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\\n+ \\n+ ## Requirements\\n+ \\n+ - VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\\n+ - Active Cursor installation with chat history\\n+ \\n+ ## Database Location\\n+ \\n+ The extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\\n+ \\n+ - **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\\n+ - **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n+ - **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n+ \\n+ ## Known Issues\\n+ \\n+ - The extension requires a workspace to be open\\n+ - Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\\n+ \\n+ ## Contributing\\n+ \\n+ Contributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit a Pull Request.\\n+ \\n+ ## License\\n+ \\n+ MIT License - see LICENSE file for details\\n+ \\n+ ## Support\\n+ \\n+ If you encounter any issues, please file them in the GitHub repository.\\n+ \\n+ ---\\n+ \\n+ **Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\\n+ \",\n",

          {
            "text": "  \"contents\": \"# Cursor Chat History\\n\\nA VS Code extension that automatically saves your Cursor AI chat history to Markdown files.\\n\\n## Features\\n\\n- ✅ **Automatic Monitoring**: Watches Cursor's database for changes\\n- ✅ **Complete History**: Captures user messages, AI responses, and thinking processes\\n- ✅ **Markdown Format**: Saves conversations in readable, version-control-friendly Markdown\\n- ✅ **Timestamped Files**: Organizes files by date and conversation title\\n- ✅ **Git Friendly**: Perfect for tracking AI conversations over time\\n\\n## Installation\\n\\n### From Source\\n\\n1. Clone this repository\\n2. Run `npm install` to install dependencies\\n3. Run `npm run compile` to build the extension\\n4. Press F5 in VS Code to launch the extension in development mode\\n\\n### From VSIX\\n\\n1. Download the `.vsix` file from releases\\n2. In VS Code, go to Extensions view\\n3. Click the `...` menu and select \\\"Install from VSIX...\\\"\\n4. Select the downloaded file\\n\\n## Usage\\n\\nThe extension activates automatically when you open a workspace in Cursor.\\n\\n### Automatic Saving\\n\\nBy default, the extension automatically monitors your Cursor chat history and saves it to `.cursor-history/` in your workspace root.\\n\\n### Manual Save\\n\\nYou can manually trigger a save by:\\n1. Opening the Command Palette (Ctrl+Shift+P / Cmd+Shift+P)\\n2. Running the command: \\\"Save Chat History Now\\\"\\n\\n## Configuration\\n\\nConfigure the extension in your VS Code settings:\\n\\n```json\\n{\\n  \\\"chatHistory.autoSave\\\": true,\\n  \\\"chatHistory.outputDirectory\\\": \\\".cursor-history\\\",\\n  \\\"chatHistory.useUTC\\\": true\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Settings\\n\\n- `chatHistory.autoSave` (default: `true`): Enable automatic saving of chat history\\n- `chatHistory.outputDirectory` (default: `.cursor-history`): Directory to save history files\\n- `chatHistory.useUTC` (default: `true`): Use UTC timezone for timestamps\\n\\n## Output Format\\n\\nConversations are saved as Markdown files with the following format:\\n\\n```markdown\\n<!-- Generated by Chat History Extension -->\\n<!-- Cursor Session {id} ({timestamp}) -->\\n\\n# Conversation Title (2025-12-23 10:30Z)\\n\\n_**User (2025-12-23 10:30Z)**_\\n\\nUser's question here\\n\\n---\\n\\n_**Agent (model claude-4.5-sonnet-thinking, mode Agent)**_\\n\\n<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>\\nAI's thinking process (if available)\\n</details></think>\\n\\n---\\n\\nAI's response here\\n\\n---\\n```\\n\\n### File Naming\\n\\nFiles are named with the pattern: `YYYY-MM-DD_HH-MMZ-{title}.md`\\n\\nExample: `2025-12-23_10-30Z-implementing-chat-history.md`\\n\\n## Requirements\\n\\n- VS Code / Cursor 1.93.0 or higher\\n- Active Cursor installation with chat history\\n\\n## Database Location\\n\\nThe extension reads from Cursor's SQLite database:\\n\\n- **Windows**: `%APPDATA%\\\\Roaming\\\\Cursor\\\\User\\\\globalStorage\\\\state.vscdb`\\n- **macOS**: `~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n- **Linux**: `~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb`\\n\\n## Known Issues\\n\\n- The extension requires a workspace to be open\\n- Database must be accessible (not locked by another process)\\n\\n## Contributing\\n\\nContributions are welcome! Please feel free to submit a Pull Request.\\n\\n## License\\n\\nMIT License - see LICENSE file for details\\n\\n## Support\\n\\nIf you encounter any issues, please file them in the GitHub repository.\\n\\n---\\n\\n**Note**: This extension is not officially affiliated with Cursor or Anysphere.\\n\"",

        "contents": "- 打开命令面板: `Ctrl+Shift+P` (Windows/Linux) 或 `Cmd+Shift+P` (macOS)\n- 运行命令: `Save Chat History Now`\n\n### 6. 配置扩展\n\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\n}\n```\n\n## 项目结构\n\n```\nllm_chat_history/\n├── src/                            # 源代码目录\n│   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\n│   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\n│   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\n│   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\n│   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\n│   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\n│   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\n├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\n├── package.json                    # 项目配置\n├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\n├── README.md                       # 项目说明\n└── LICENSE                         # 许可证\n```\n\n## 故障排除\n\n### 问题：扩展没有启动\n\n- 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\n- 检查数据库文件是否存在\n\n### 问题：没有生成历史文件\n\n- 确认 `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `true`\n- 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\n- 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\n\n### 问题：数据库锁定错误\n\n- 关闭 Cursor 后重试\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\n\n### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\n\n**Windows 用户常见问题**：`better-sqlite3` 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\n\n**解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\n```bash\nnpm run setup\n```\n\n此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\n\n**解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\n\n",
        "originalContents": "- 打开命令面板: `Ctrl+Shift+P` (Windows/Linux) 或 `Cmd+Shift+P` (macOS)\n- 运行命令: `Save Chat History Now`\n\n### 6. 配置扩展\n\n在 VS Code 设置中搜索 \"Chat History\":\n\n```json\n{\n  \"chatHistory.autoSave\": true,\n  \"chatHistory.outputDirectory\": \".llm-chat-history\",\n  \"chatHistory.useUTC\": true\n}\n```\n\n## 项目结构\n\n```\nllm_chat_history/\n├── src/                            # 源代码目录\n│   ├── types.ts                    # 类型定义\n│   ├── database-reader.ts          # 数据库读取器\n│   ├── conversation-builder.ts     # 对话构建器\n│   ├── markdown-generator.ts       # Markdown 生成器\n│   ├── history-saver.ts            # 历史保存器\n│   ├── database-watcher.ts         # 数据库监听器\n│   └── extension.ts                # 扩展入口\n├── dist/                           # 编译输出目录\n├── package.json                    # 项目配置\n├── tsconfig.json                   # TypeScript 配置\n├── README.md                       # 项目说明\n└── LICENSE                         # 许可证\n```\n\n## 故障排除\n\n### 问题：扩展没有启动\n\n- 确保你在 Cursor 中打开了工作区\n- 检查数据库文件是否存在\n\n### 问题：没有生成历史文件\n\n- 确认 `chatHistory.autoSave` 设置为 `true`\n- 检查 Cursor 是否有对话记录\n- 手动运行 \"Save Chat History Now\" 命令\n\n### 问题：数据库锁定错误\n\n- 关闭 Cursor 后重试\n- 扩展使用只读模式，通常不会冲突\n\n### 问题：Could not locate the bindings file (better-sqlite3)\n\n**Windows 用户常见问题**：`better-sqlite3` 需要编译为 Electron 版本。\n\n**解决方案 1（推荐）**：运行设置脚本\n```bash\nnpm run setup\n```\n\n此脚本会自动检测 Electron 版本并下载对应的预编译二进制文件。\n\n**解决方案 2**：NODE_MODULE_VERSION 不匹配错误\n\n",

});\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {
  "contents": "import { ComposerData, Bubble } from '../../types';\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './cursor-database-reader';\n\n/**\n * WorkspaceFilter filters composers so we only export chats\n * that belong to the currently open workspace.\n */\nexport class WorkspaceFilter {\n    private currentWorkspacePath: string;\n\n    constructor(workspacePath: string) {\n        this.currentWorkspacePath = this.normalizePath(workspacePath || '');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Returns true if the composer belongs to the current workspace.\n     */\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n        composer: ComposerData,\n        reader: CursorDatabaseReader\n    ): boolean {\n        if (!this.currentWorkspacePath) {\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\n        if (headers.length === 0) {\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        const firstBubbleId = headers[0].bubbleId;\n        const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, [firstBubbleId]);\n        if (bubbles.length === 0) {\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        const bubble = bubbles[0] as Bubble & { workspaceProjectDir?: string };\n\n        // Prefer workspaceUris when available\n        if (bubble.workspaceUris && bubble.workspaceUris.length > 0) {\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.uriToPath(bubble.workspaceUris[0]);\n            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\n                return true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Fallback to workspaceProjectDir\n        if ((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir) {\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.normalizePath((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir);\n            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\n                return true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Convert a file:// URI to a filesystem path.\n     */\n    private uriToPath(uri: string): string {\n        try {\n            const decoded = decodeURIComponent(uri);\n            let fsPath = decoded.replace(/^file:\\/\\/\\//, '');\n\n            // Windows drive letters are URL encoded (e.g., d%3A)\n            if (process.platform === 'win32') {\n                fsPath = fsPath.replace(/%3A/gi, ':');\n            }\n\n            return this.normalizePath(fsPath);\n        } catch {\n            return '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Normalize paths for reliable comparison (cross-platform compatible).\n     * - Convert backslashes to forward slashes\n     * - Convert to lowercase (for case-insensitive comparison across platforms)\n     * - Remove trailing slash\n     */\n    private normalizePath(filepath: string): string {\n        if (!filepath) return '';\n\n        // 统一使用正斜杠\n        let normalized = filepath.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\n\n        // 始终转换为小写（跨平台兼容：Windows 数据在 Linux 上也能正确比较）\n        normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();\n\n        // 移除末尾斜杠\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\/$/, '');\n\n        return normalized;\n    }\n\n    private pathsMatch(path1: string, path2: string): boolean {\n        return this.normalizePath(path1) === this.normalizePath(path2);\n    }\n}\n",

  "contents": "/**\n * 历史记录保存器\n * 负责将 Markdown 内容保存到文件系统\n */\n\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ComposerData } from './types';\nimport { trackEventIfLoggedIn, TelemetryEvents } from './telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport class HistorySaver {\n    private historyDir: string;\n    private source: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history/history', source: string = 'unknown') {\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\n        this.source = source;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 保存对话到文件\n     */\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\n        // 确保目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\n\n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n\n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n\n        if (shouldSave) {\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n            \n            // 上报文件保存事件（仅登录用户）\n            trackEventIfLoggedIn(TelemetryEvents.FILE_SAVED_LOCALLY, {\n                source: this.source,\n                session_id: composer.composerId,\n            });\n        }\n\n        return filepath;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成文件名\n     */\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\n        \n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\n     */\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\n        // 移除特殊字符\n        return title\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\n            .toLowerCase()\n            .substring(0, 50);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 检查是否需要保存\n     */\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\n        try {\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\n        } catch {\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

> 问题在于：用户当前打开的工作区是 `/Users/Clark/Projects/llm-chat-history-plugin`，但这 19 个对话可能都不属于这个工作区（它们是在其他项目中创建的）。
>

>
> 1. 第一次激活：`No workspace folder open` - 没有工作区打开
> 2. 第二次激活后：
>    - `Cursor database found, starting Cursor watcher` - ✅ 数据库找到
>    - `Found 19 composers` - ✅ 找到了19个对话
>    - `Database watcher started` - ✅ 监视器启动
>    - 但没有任何保存输出
>
> **根本原因**：扩展设计为只保存属于当前工作区的对话。这 19 个对话是在其他项目/工作区中创建的，所以不会被保存到当前工作区。
>
> 建议：
> 1. 如果想保存特定项目的对话历史，需要在该项目文件夹中打开 Cursor

## 🤖 Assistant #17 (Agent)

_2025-12-27 15:38Z_

根据日志分析，我找到了原因。这**不是 bug**，而是扩展的设计行为：

## 📋 日志分析

从日志可以看到：

1. ✅ `Cursor database found, starting Cursor watcher` - 数据库找到了
2. ✅ `Found 19 composers` - 找到了 19 个对话  
3. ✅ `Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)` - 监视器正常启动
4. ❌ 没有任何对话被保存

## 🔍 根本原因

**工作区过滤机制**：扩展设计为**只保存属于当前打开工作区的对话**。

查看 `cursor-database-watcher.ts` 第 200-208 行的逻辑：

```200:208:src/agents/cursor/cursor-database-watcher.ts
            for (const composer of composers) {
                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话
                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(
                    composer,
                    reader
                );
                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {
                    continue;  // ← 跳过不属于当前工作区的对话
                }
```

你当前打开的工作区是 `/Users/Clark/Projects/llm-chat-history-plugin`，但这 19 个对话都是在**其他项目**中创建的，所以都被跳过了。

## ✅ 解决方案

**方案 1**：在正确的工作区中使用
- 打开你真正进行 AI 对话的项目文件夹
- 扩展会自动保存该项目的对话历史到 `.llm-chat-history/history/`

**方案 2**：手动验证
- 在你常用的项目中打开 Cursor
- 运行命令：`Cmd+Shift+P` → 搜索 "Save Chat History Now"
- 检查该项目下是否生成了 `.llm-chat-history/history/` 文件夹

---

**关于 `Failed to save event` 错误**：这只是遥测事件发送失败（在扩展停用时发生），与对话历史保存无关，可以忽略。

});\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n           throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Current workspace: ${this.workspaceRoot}`);\n\n            let skippedCount = 0;\n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    skippedCount++;\n                    continue;\n                }\n                console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ✓ Matched composer: ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n\n                // 保存到本地\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\n                const now = new Date();\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                workspace_path: session.workspace_path,\n                workspace_name: session.workspace_name,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        let reader: CursorDatabaseReader;\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试创建数据库读取器\n            reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n        } catch (error) {\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\n\n                console.log('Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to fix...');\n\n                // 尝试重新加载 SQLite3\n                const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(this.extensionPath);\n                const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n\n                if (!sqliteReady) {\n                    throw new Error('Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary. Please check the extension logs for more details.');\n                }\n\n                // 重新尝试创建数据库读取器\n                reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n            } else {\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Current workspace: ${this.workspaceRoot}`);\n\n            let skippedCount = 0;\n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    skippedCount++;\n                    continue;\n                }\n                console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ✓ Matched composer: ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n\n                // 保存到本地\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n            \n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Skipped ${skippedCount} composers (not in current workspace)`);\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Matched ${sessionsToCache.length} composers for saving`);\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\n                const now = new Date();\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                workspace_path: session.workspace_path,\n                workspace_name: session.workspace_name,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}
